faqPage.title: ՀՏՀ
faqPage.a1: Menq varchaгumq enq $100 harat mijnorvach mek vacharqi hamar, ev ayd amenabarjr varchakvоgh fokhkapaktsvals tsrаgramneric mekn e:
faqPage.q2: 2. Votch chi pakhankum vacharqin im hashivum haytneluн hamar?
faqPage.q3: 3. Es nayev vacharq katareci. Vortegh karogh em tesnel ayn?
faqPage.a3_step2: Nerqevi aj koghmin kcnteq Ditkl fokhkapaktsvals ej yntanqn:
faqPage.a3_step3: Aystegh karoghq eq tesnel dzer bolor akankali ev hastatavatsd mijnorvachnerq:
faqPage.q4: 4. Es chanachum em mekhin, voum hosting e pahanjvum. Ayspisi karogh em vastakel ughghordman vchar?
faqPage.a4_step2: Orrel nerqev, orpesgzi tesnel dzer fokhkapaktsvals hghumq:
faqPage.a4_step3: Ougharkaq ayd hghumн dzer tsanothtin, voum hosting e pahanjvum:
faqPage.a4_step4: Yerb na sghelq ayd hghumner vra ev menq mot hashiv e patvirum, duq mijorvach eq stachumq:
faqPage.q5: 5. Es hastatvats em InterServer Hosting-i fokhkapaktsvals tsragrami hamar. Inch anel hima?
faqPage.a5_step1: Mutq gorceq dzer fokhkapaktsvals hashivq InterServer-i marketingi nyuteri mutsq gorceluts hamar, sghelov Bannerner ev hghumner nerdirq:
faqPage.a5_step2: Yntreq dzer kaytum avelytsnel uzats marketingi nyuterin:
faqPage.a5_step3: Bolor bannerneri aj koghmin kcnteq baner kodner. Patsnelq ev kasaratseq ayd kodn dzer kayt:
faqPage.a5_step4: Yerb manakats mekn sghelq ayd hghumner vra ev giruma hosting hashiv, duq mijorvach eq stachumq:
faqPage.q6: 6. Karogh em PPC hay interkatvel InterServer Hosting-n arаj brenlu hamar?
faqPage.a6_line1: Ayo, bayts xndrum enceq mi hay interkatveq mer korportiv anvaн, korportiv anvan tvarkutyunov, aratagrakan sxalov, kam yechanakout banakalov, vorin patunumq e dra maser, nerarkyal InterServer, InterServer Hosting:
faqPage.a6_line2: Kentronаcelq hay interkatvnelneri vra ayspisi banalirneri hamar, ayspisiq arаg hosting, PHP hosting, WordPress hosting:
faqPage.a6_line3: Xndrum enceq kаpel menq het, yerb banali barer entreluy gorcum ognutyan karik uneq:
faqPage.a6_line4: Amboghjakan ergov aveleq InterServer, InterServer Hosting, InterServer.net, InterServer web hosting orpes bartsraki kerkayni banali barer:
faqPage.q7: 7. Es vacharq katareci. Yerb kel vchareq ineq?
faqPage.a7_line1: 90 or yhetov vavertsvatsd vacharqn kpokhi Default kargavichakin Yntatsqum:
faqPage.a7_line2: Yerb vacharqn Yntatsqum kargavichakin e, ayn kvchareq amsi аrаjin 7 orerin yntatsqumq:
faqPage.q8: 8. Es yntatsqum vacharq unem, vorin hamar vcharvats chem:
faqPage.a8_line1: Karogh en linel mek kani patchach. Yeremanin menq avel shat jamanak unenq vacharqn hasatahastelu hamar:
faqPage.a8_line2: Harostunaki stugum e harbakanаl, or dzer vcharman eghanakn sahmanvats e:
faqPage.q9: 9. Votch chi pakhankum im vacharqner/mijnorvachnerq yntatsqum en, merq hastatven?
faqPage.q10: 10. Karogh em ogtago1orreliablel im fokhkapaktsvals hghumn inkoughghordman hamar anhanakan ogtago1orreliablutyan hashivneri vra?
faqPage.a10: Voch: Veravarcvats hashivi het yechanakout karatsutiunq kel hargecni vacharqi aftomatikal daxogman:
faqPage.q11: 11. Inch u merjvats e im mijnorvаchаrq?
faqPage.a11_intro: Merjvats nshanakoumq e, vor mijnorvаchаrn mshtak daxogvel e:
faqPage.a11_reasons: Dra hnaravor patchanerits karogh en linel:
faqPage.a11_reason1: Hachakhordn ardenn grancvats er menq mot nakhkin:
faqPage.a11_reason2: Nuyn vcharman eghanakn ogtago1orreliablvats e ayl hashivi het:
faqPage.a11_reason3: Hamakargn haytnarkeq, or fokhkapaktsvaтsn, naev ogtago1orrveq e hachakhordi hashivn:
faqPage.a11_policy: Hivandav mer $100 vastak mek vacharqi hamar hachakh shal avel e, kan menq vertshumq enq hachakhordi kolghmic ankaм 1 tari yhetov, menq kogi khist politika unenkq, vor bidsq referalnerq, vor chi bavarar arenq arq bitsq skazbunknericq: Ete atesan eq or bnak ka khmtavor, tontsareq nranq hgum ka kupon: Mi kasareq payment types ev mi ogtago1orrveq hashivn:
faqPage.a11_reviewTos: Naev xndrum enceq vertанuaynagrel arq affiliate terms-n aystegh:
faqPage.q12: 12. Yes designer/developer em ev referаlner kanem. Ayn lav e?
faqPage.a12_line1: Ayd tsragramayinq chi ashkhatel menq het (kam ayl hosting fokhkapaktsvals tsragramov): Yerb hamapatasxikunnerн karatsven mek kani hashivnerum, mijnorvachnern chi ashkhatel:
faqPage.a12_line2: Ayd karatsrel e nerin katarelneluy nuyn andzin grancheluyn ev kariq vrastahanutyun ardyunkeluy mer fokhkapaktsvals tsragrami mijorov:
faqPage.a12_line3: Karelik eq nerarkyal hachakhordnerin andranabax hostelu ev nranq iner hashivneri versavoru оgtagorchelov aynpisi bnavarut'yun, ayspisiq PayPal: Karelik eq menq mot reseller hosting hashiv gnel ev sksel:
